description_long: This object is a military-style jet airplane with a sleek, streamlined fuselage and sharply swept delta wings. The wings are mounted low on the body and extend outward in a triangular shape, giving the aircraft a distinctive silhouette. The nose is pointed and features a prominent air intake, while the cockpit is positioned near the front with a clear canopy. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, forming a conventional tail design. The exterior is finished in a combination of dark green and metallic silver, with subtle panel lines and surface details visible along the fuselage and wings.
description: A sleek, military-style jet airplane with delta wings, a pointed nose, and a single vertical tail, finished in dark green and metallic silver.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, air intake, and the triangular delta wings extending outward.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the streamlined fuselage, cockpit canopy, and the swept delta wing shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the engine exhaust, tail section, and the full span of the delta wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the tail and wing configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept delta wing configuration with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single jet engine integrated in the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear, with main and nose gear units implied but not visibly extended.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy integrated into the fuselage.
